2:20PM C/C FOR SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE. ALL PARTIES PRESENT. CASE SETTLED. TERMS AND CONDITION STATED ON RECORD. JUDGMENT FOR POSSESSION OF PREMISES. JUDGMENT IN THE TOTAL AMOUNT OF $653.50. PLAINTIFF TO PREPARE STIPULATION JUDGMENT.

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT WEINSTEIN, SAMUEL THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 1590 BROADWAY, APT. 329W, S.F. $546.00 RENT, $107.50 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $653.50, LEASE FORFEITED, $107.00 SECURITY DEPOSIT TO BE RETURNED TO DEFT IF VACATE BEFORE 5:00 P.M. OCT 1, 1993. FT VACATE SECURITY DEPOSIT APPLIED PURS TO 1950.5 CC. NO FURTHER STAYS. SEE JUDGMENT FOR DETAILS.
